documentTypeKm: លិខិតផ្លូវការរបស់រាជរដ្ឋាភិបាល
mustWrite: Kingdom of Cambodia header: ព្រះរាជាណាចក្រកម្ពុជា / ជាតិ សាសនា ព្រះមហាក្សត្រ
Ministry/department name in Khmer OS Muol Light font
Reference number in format: លេខ ១២៣ ស.ហ.វ
Date in Khmer format: រាជធានីភ្នំពេញ ថ្ងៃទី... ខែ... ឆ្នាំ...
Formal salutation appropriate to recipient rank
Clear subject line prefixed with កម្មវត្ថុ:
Respectful closing with សូមទទួលនូវការគោរពដ៏ខ្ពង់ខ្ពស់ or equivalent
CC list if applicable, with proper titles
mustNotWrite: Informal language, slang, or colloquial Khmer
Personal opinions not backed by policy/regulation
Foreign language terms when Khmer equivalent exists
Promises or commitments without proper authorization level
Sensitive information not classified for the recipient level

toneGuidelines.honorifics: Always use proper titles: ឯកឧត្តម, លោក, លោកស្រី, etc.
toneGuidelines.voice: Third person institutional (the Ministry, the Department)
toneGuidelines.politeness: High formal — use សូម, មេត្តា, ការគោរព patterns

complianceChecks: Reference number follows ministry numbering scheme
Date format matches Khmer government standard
Content does not exceed authorization level of signer
Language register is consistently formal throughout
